question_text: Let 𝑋 be a random variable taking only two values, 1 and 2. Let 𝑀𝑋(⋅) be the moment generating function of 𝑋. If the expectation of 𝑋 is 10 7 , then the fourth

options.D: erivative of 𝑀𝑋(⋅) evaluated at 0 equals
options.C: (D) Q.18 Two fair dice, one having red and another having blue colour, are tossed independently once. Let 𝐴 be the event that the die having red colour will show 5 or 6. Let 𝐵 be the event that the sum of the outcomes will be 7 and let 𝐶 be the event that the sum of the outcomes will be 8. Then which one of the following statements is true?
options.B: 𝐴 and 𝐵 are independent, but 𝐴 and 𝐶 are not independent
